_meta.schema: fields: case, sender_privkey_hex, sender_pubkey_hex, recipient_privkey_hex, recipient_pubkey_hex, plaintext, content_format ('<base64-ciphertext>?iv=<base64-iv>'), valid (bool), note?

vectors.note: Spec only specifies the wire shape `<b64-ciphertext>?iv=<b64-iv>`. NIP-04 has no canonical test vectors; substrates SHOULD round-trip encrypt+decrypt and verify the shape regex.

vectors.shared_secret_rule: X-coordinate of secp256k1_ecdh(sender_priv, recipient_pub), 32 bytes, NOT hashed
vectors.note: NIP-04 explicitly mandates the X coordinate is used directly as AES-256-CBC key without SHA hashing. Substrates MUST round-trip: encrypt(alice→bob) then decrypt(bob←alice) MUST yield the original plaintext.
Content lacks the `?iv=` separator — must be rejected during parse.
IV cannot be empty — AES-CBC requires 16-byte (24-char base64) IV.
